subcodes.first_line: O Ali, upon thee be My Glory! This Wronged One, while sorrows have encompassed Him from all directions, doth call to mind the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی اینمظلوم در حالتیکه احزان از جمیع جهات احاطه نموده اولیا را
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
